sections.heading: (1) OntheauthorityofawarrantissuedbythePresident, Supplementary
sections.text:
theremaybeexpendedfromtheConsolidatedFund,suchmonies Appropriation
not exceeding in the aggregate three billion, five hundred and
seventy-sevenmillion,forty-eightthousand,threehundredandsixty-
five kwacha indicated in respect of the services of the Republic
specified in the third column of the First Schedule and Second
Schedule,beingexpenditureinexcessofthemoniesappropriated
fortheservicesoftheRepublicduringthefinancialyearendingon
31stDecember,2018.
SinglecopiesofthisActmaybeobtainedfromtheGovernmentPrinter,
P.O.Box30136,10101Lusaka,PriceK8.00each.
